title: Chief Brand & Aesthetic Officer
summary: The brand and aesthetic leader responsible for identity, design language, visual discipline, naming, and perception architecture.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Brand & Aesthetic Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The brand and aesthetic leader responsible for identity, design language, visual discipline, naming, and perception architecture.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Protect the Neuroartan brand so public expression remains precise, premium, coherent, and unmistakably connected to the product system.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
